Class MediaTableModel

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.table.AbstractTableModel
martin.viewtool.core.MediaTableModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, TableModel
public final class MediaTableModel extends AbstractTableModel
Table model that combines network media from the API and local files. Supports pagination and resolves user nicknames asynchronously.
Author:
cesar
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • MediaTableModel

      public MediaTableModel(List<MediaSyncPolling.Media> allFiles, MediaService mediaService, int page, int pageSize, MediaSyncPolling.MediaSyncPolling mediaSyncPolling, String token)
      Creates a new MediaTableModel.
      Parameters:
      allFiles - full list of media from the API
      mediaService - used to resolve the local download directory
      page - initial page number (1-based)
      pageSize - number of rows per page
      mediaSyncPolling - polling component used to fetch user nicknames
      token - authentication token passed to the API

      public void updatePage(int page, int pageSize)
      Switches the visible page and notifies the table of data changes.
      Parameters:
      page - page number to display
      pageSize - number of rows per page

    • getFile

      public MediaSyncPolling.Media getFile(int row)
      Returns the Media object for the given row in the current page.
      Parameters:
      row - row index within the current page
      Returns:
      the media at that row
